_comment: Vendor boundary access control per ADR-030. 'sentinels' are permanent drift-detection tests that intentionally read vendor source. 'allowlist' is for temporary migration exceptions (should be empty when migration is complete).

sentinels.reason: Drift guard — reads vendor source to verify hook type definitions
Drift guard — reads vendor source to verify hook wiring
Drift guard — reads vendor source to verify browser tool integration
Drift guard — reads vendor source to verify tool description
Drift guard — validates obfuscation detection respects ask=off (vendor patch 0003)
Drift guard — validates requiresExecApproval returns false when ask=off (vendor patch 0003)
